---
title: "Schedule"
description-meta: "Schedule for the Tartu 2026 Transport Data Science workshop."
pagetitle: "Workshop Schedule"
---

## Day 1

| Time          | Session                                                                 |   |
|---------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|:---:|
| 10:00 - 11:00 | Introduction to Data Science for Transport Planning                     |   |
| 11:00 - 12:30 | Finding, importing and cleaning transport datasets                      | [{{< bi file-earmark-code size=1.5em >}}](s1.qmd)  |
| 12:30 - 13:30 | Lunch                                                                  |   |
| 13:30 - 15:00 | Origin-destination data analysis                                        | [{{< bi file-earmark-code size=1.5em >}}](s2.qmd)    |
| 15:00 - 15:15 | Break and refreshments                                                 |    |
| 15:15 - 17:00 | OD Transport data visualisation                                        | [{{< bi file-earmark-code size=1.5em >}}](s3.qmd) |

: {tbl-colwidths="[20,75,5]" .striped}

## Day 2

| Time          | Session                                                                 |   |
|---------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|:---:|
| 09:00 - 10:45 | Spatio-temporal data                                                    | [{{< bi file-earmark-code size=1.5em >}}](s4.qmd) |
| 10:45 - 11:15 | Break and refreshments                                                 | |
| 11:15 - 12:30 | Routing and route network analysis                                      | [{{< bi file-earmark-code size=1.5em >}}](s5.qmd)|
| 12:30 - 13:30 | Lunch                                                                  | |
| 13:30 - 15:00 | Best practices: version control and reproducible research               | [{{< bi file-earmark-code size=1.5em >}}](s6.qmd) |
| 15:00 - 16:00 | Advanced topics and deploying work                                      | [{{< bi file-earmark-code size=1.5em >}}](s7.qmd)  |

: {tbl-colwidths="[20,75,5]" .striped}
